headline: Benzinga's 'Stock Whisper' Index: 5 Stocks Investors Secretly Monitor But Don't Talk About Yet
summary: The Benzinga Stock Whisper Index highlights five stocks seeing increased interest from readers during the week and a look at the potential catalysts driving the attention.

summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Anthropic Co-founder Says AGI 'Possible' By 2028 But 'Transformative AI' Will Have To Pass The 'Economic Turing Test'
summary: Ben Mann believes transformative AI will arrive after passing the economic Turing test which evaluates AI's ability to perform economically valuable tasks.

headline: Jensen Huang Is Motivated By 'Fear, Guilt, Anxiety,' Reveals Nvidia CEO's Biographer: 'Gets Very Uncomfortable...Nervous When Things Are Going Well'
summary: Jensen Huang, the CEO of Nvidia Corp (NASDAQ: NVDA), is driven by his fear of failure, which is a significant factor in his success, according to his biographer, Stephen Witt.
